Eurohouse Developer Team (@eurohouse) ·: Latest fixes to our web app includes more minimalistic command line icons, more minified and less cluttery code, updated macroses, one button now displays current command line interface mode and switches between these modes.

Happy 8th of March, our beautiful ladies! The Eurohouse Developer Team updated its web app on the International Women's Day to give you more pleasurable and comfortable experience with the app. Now there are 3 command line modes: command, chat and search. Each changes the logic of command line.
